column1: # Comparison arms for the pos-embed resampling study.
# Factorial: resolution (grid) x resample method. Recipe is otherwise IDENTICAL
# across arms (the frozen winning recipe in env.sh COMMON).
#   grid = img_size / 32  (CLIP ViT-B/32). 7x7 is the pretrained native grid.
#   'aligned' = bilinear + align_corners=True -> on an ODD grid N=2k-1 the original
#               49 anchors land EXACTLY on output nodes (lossless). 13 (=2*7-1)@416
#               and 19 (=3*7-1)@608 are the clean cases; 14@448 is even (no exact preserve).
#   scales = TTA resize scales (must be >= img_size; mirror of the 448/512/576 pattern).
#   bs     = batch size; tune to your GPU VRAM. 416(169 tok) is CHEAPER than 448(196 tok).
# name           img   pos      bs   scales          tier
